brand-story-img.query: Jewelry with Intention Velmora was born from a belief that fine jewelry should feel accessible without sacrificing craftsmanship. Each piece is designed in small batches, using 18K gold plating and hypoallergenic materials that honor both your skin and your style. We create for the woman who buys herself flowers — and the perfect pair of earrings to match. For the gift-giver who believes presentation is part of the present. For anyone who understands that the smallest details often speak the loudest.
